steps.title: Spot the comparison signal
steps.content: The underlined phrase uses much like to draw a direct parallel between the mantises' filters and 3D movie glasses — an explicit comparison.

steps.title: Assess its function
steps.content:
By linking an unfamiliar experimental setup to something readers know (3D movie glasses), the author aids understanding of the mantis study — exactly what choice B states.

Choices A and C describe functions the underlined phrase doesn't serve (identifying a problem or emphasizing research differences), and choice D misidentifies the purpose of the historical reference (“once worn”).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
